mapper.sql: id, document_id, title, version, product_code, status, effective_from, effective_to, source_url, content_hash, qdrant_collection, vector_sync_status, created_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO policy_document (document_id, title, version, product_code, status, effective_from, effective_to, source_url, content_hash, qdrant_collection, vector_sync_status, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{title}, #{version}, #{productCode}, #{status}, #{effectiveFrom}, #{effectiveTo}, #{sourceUrl}, #{contentHash}, #{qdrantCollection}, #{vectorSyncStatus}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM policy_document WHERE document_id=#{documentId} AND version=#{version} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM policy_document ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 100
